statement: Meta reportedly plans to deploy up to 6 gigawatts of AMD Instinct GPUs, a large demand and share-shift signal for AMD accelerators.
why: A hyperscaler committing to up to 6 GW of AMD Instinct is a major design win that shifts AI-accelerator demand and share toward AMD and away from Nvidia.

impact.mechanism: A multi-gigawatt AMD Instinct deployment plan at a top hyperscaler is a large forward-demand and market-share signal for AMD merchant GPU.

evidence.excerpt: Meta reportedly plans to deploy 'up to 6 gigawatts of AMD Instinct GPUs.'

confidence.basis: Single secondary source (Forbes); reported plan, no primary filing.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: magnitude 1 -> 2; sources: Forbes, Yahoo Finance
